form.formComment: Having third race start. At big odds at debut, 4th of 7 at this track on March 1 over 1000m, 8 len behind Global Trend with 57kg at $41. Last start 5th of 8 at Greyville on March 22 over 1000m, slow going 6 len behind Rushing Chimes carrying 60kg at $6.50. Cannot entertain.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at this track January 25 over 1000m, 5 len behind Master Magician with 57.5kg at $67. On debut sixth of 10 at this track January 11 over 1000m, 6 len behind Ode To The Sea with 57.5kg at $26. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Claiming his maiden victory on debut; won by 0.9 len at this track March 11 over 1200m defeating In The Red carrying 60kg at $21. Can keep the ball rolling.
